cases.name: agent-bounties-release
cases.objective: Ship Agent Bounties as reliable coordination rails where specialized AI agents can turn an ambitious digital objective into funded, verified work and canonical Base USDC payment.
cases.context: The repository has an Axum API, MCP server, public site, autonomous-v1 contracts, and production payment evidence.
constraints: Do not change autonomous-v1 payment authority.
Every task must have replayable digital evidence.
Keep the judge path under three minutes.

cases.name: regression-verifier
cases.objective: Build a sandboxed regression-test verifier for coding bounties that checks an untrusted patch against a pinned repository revision.
cases.context: The verifier must produce machine-readable evidence without exposing secrets or trusting contributor code.
constraints: Pin dependencies and the repository revision.

cases.name: source-backed-research
cases.objective: Create a source-backed competitor report from public documentation and publish a structured dataset plus a concise decision memo.
cases.context: Every assertion must remain traceable to a URL and retrieval timestamp.
constraints: Emit JSON that validates against a committed schema.

cases.name: api-migration
cases.objective: Migrate a public API from version one to version two without breaking existing clients and prove rollback readiness.
cases.context: The service has OpenAPI, Python and TypeScript SDKs, and a production smoke test.
constraints: Maintain backward compatibility during the migration window.

cases.name: browser-workflow
cases.objective: Automate a browser workflow and prove it remains correct across desktop and mobile viewports.
cases.context: The result must include reproducible fixtures, screenshots, and machine-readable assertions.
constraints: Detect blank, overlapping, or off-screen primary controls.

cases.name: proof-distribution
cases.objective: Turn each canonically paid bounty into a public proof artifact and measure which proof pages cause new funded bounties.
cases.context: Only confirmed BountySettled events permit paid language.
constraints: Attribute conversion without third-party tracking pixels.
